englishDefinitions: A deliberate, unsportsmanlike, and potentially illegal act of aggression against an opponent.
(by extension) A remark that unfairly disparages an obvious vulnerability of the target.
persianTranslation: تجاوز عمدی، غیرورزشی و بالقوه غیرقانونی به حریف.
(با گسترش) نکته ای که به طور غیرمنصفانه آسیب پذیری آشکار هدف را تحقیر می کند.
examples: Attacking a goalie trying to make a save is a total cheap shot, I think.
School bullies always take cheap shots at kids with glasses.
